item.title: Apology, BPL Clash, PAC & Tourist Death
item.ns0:title: Apology, BPL Clash, PAC & Tourist Death
item.description:
Tonight on Our News, the Department of Corrections Commissioner issues a formal apology following a public outcry over comments regarding female recruits, while a high-stakes showdown erupts in the House of Assembly over an attempt to table a controversial US affidavit. Tensions continue to boil in Parliament as the House Speaker stands her ground in a fiery clash with the opposition over the Public Accounts Committee’s mandate and the future of government oversight. We also bring you the latest on a tragic snorkeling accident off West Bay Street and the government's defense of the local egg industry against rising international competition. Catch the full report for these stories, the latest results from the baseball diamond, and your complete tropical weather outlook.
-----
Copyright Disclaimer under section 107 of the Copyright Act of 1976, allowance is made for "fair use" for purposes such as criticism, comment, news reporting, teaching, scholarship, education and research. Fair use is a use permitted by copyright statute that might otherwise be infringing.
item.ns1:encoded:
Tonight on Our News, the Department of Corrections Commissioner issues a formal apology following a public outcry over comments regarding female recruits, while a high-stakes showdown erupts in the House of Assembly over an attempt to table a controversial US affidavit. Tensions continue to boil in Parliament as the House Speaker stands her ground in a fiery clash with the opposition over the Public Accounts Committee’s mandate and the future of government oversight. We also bring you the latest on a tragic snorkeling accident off West Bay Street and the government's defense of the local egg industry against rising international competition. Catch the full report for these stories, the latest results from the baseball diamond, and your complete tropical weather outlook.
-----
Copyright Disclaimer under section 107 of the Copyright Act of 1976, allowance is made for "fair use" for purposes such as criticism, comment, news reporting, teaching, scholarship, education and research. Fair use is a use permitted by copyright statute that might otherwise be infringing.
item.ns0:summary:
Tonight on Our News, the Department of Corrections Commissioner issues a formal apology following a public outcry over comments regarding female recruits, while a high-stakes showdown erupts in the House of Assembly over an attempt to table a controversial US affidavit. Tensions continue to boil in Parliament as the House Speaker stands her ground in a fiery clash with the opposition over the Public Accounts Committee’s mandate and the future of government oversight. We also bring you the latest on a tragic snorkeling accident off West Bay Street and the government's defense of the local egg industry against rising international competition. Catch the full report for these stories, the latest results from the baseball diamond, and your complete tropical weather outlook.
-----

item.ns0:author: Our News Bahamas
